notable_phrases: the dawn of a second wave of digital transformation sweeping every company and every industry
record quarter driven by our commercial cloud, which surpassed 16 billion in revenue, up 34% year over year
we saw is really fundamental consumption growth and some re-acceleration of growth curves
summary: Microsoft reported a record quarter with strong cloud growth and positioned itself as powering a second wave of digital transformation across all industries, with management expressing high confidence in sustained momentum despite tougher comparables ahead.
change_summary: vs 2021 Q1: Management overall confidence increased by 10.00.
